f1.title: Keep track of your top customers and hot leads on your map
f1.desc: As a sales rep, do you find it hard to get an accurate overview of your territory? And to know where to focus your energy? S-Locator is the best sales route planning software to help you:
f1.b1: Identify current opportunities using color-coded maps and filters (e.g., ABC categories)
f1.b2: Visually differentiate accounts using eye-catching icons

f2.title: (Re)schedule anytime and achieve up to 25% more customer visits
f2.desc: Field sales are dynamic by nature - it makes sense that you need a dynamic route planner app to excel. S-Locator puts an end to the chaos of inevitable rescheduling.
f2.b1: Appointment canceled? Generate an updated schedule in seconds to suit your current circumstances
f2.b2: Update your schedule whenever necessary to ensure maximum efficiency
f2.b3: Visit urgency, specific business hours, and many other factors can be taken into account

f3.title: Visit accounts at the right moment to close the deal
f3.desc: Do you find it tricky to prioritize your customers? Tired of constantly putting out fires? The S-Locator route planner app ensures you get a grip on all the details in your territory.
f3.b1: Free yourself from the stress of planning the next visit - let S-Locator track and act for you

guide.desc: An automatic sales route planner app is the smart way to manage your visits. Learn how to get started with our comprehensive guide.

q1.q: How much will I save with S-Locator? When will I recoup my investment?
q1.a: With S-Locator, you can make an average of one additional visit per day, generating around €1,000 in added value per sales rep per month.

q2.q: Will S-Locator record the routes I drive?
q2.a: No; S-Locator does not store driving GPS logs. It is a fantastic aid for field reps, not a surveillance tool.

q3.q: Can I use S-Locator with Salesforce or other CRM systems?
q3.a: Yes, S-Locator works out-of-the-box with Salesforce, Microsoft Dynamics CRM, and other enterprise systems.

q4.q: Can I integrate the S-Locator algorithm into my own application?
q4.a: Yes, you can do so via our ISV API.

q5.q: Someone calls and wants to schedule an appointment – how does S-Locator react?
q5.a: You can enter the appointment directly. The system detects conflicts and optimizes your itinerary in real time to reflect the adjusted schedule.

q6.q: Can S-Locator help me avoid traffic jams?
q6.a: Yes, S-Locator takes current traffic conditions into account when planning a route.

q7.q: Does the S-Locator route planner help me win new customers?
q7.a: Yes. Import your leads, and S-Locator will calculate optimized routes to reach them.

q8.a: Yes, the app retains critical data to work offline directly in your browser.

q9.q: Which industries is route planning suitable for?
q9.a: It is suitable for all industries and companies of any size, from a one-person business to enterprises with thousands of reps.

q10.q: How can I get help and technical support?
q10.a: We offer tutorial videos, PDF guides, built-in support, and email assistance.

q11.q: What are the suitable use cases for S-Locator?
q11.a: Regular customer visits, one-off visits, acquiring new customers, and recurring service activities.

q12.q: I would like a demo of S-Locator.
q12.a: We would be happy to set up an online presentation for your management and sales reps.

q13.q: Can I try S-Locator without any commitment or cost?
q13.a: Yes. You can sign up for a free trial that automatically ends after 30 days at no cost.

q14.q: Is S-Locator for centralized or decentralized route planning?
q14.a: It can be used for centralized, decentralized, or hybrid planning.

q15.q: Can I use S-Locator for territory alignment or geomarketing?
q15.a: Yes. The 'Territory Optimization' add-on helps you optimize your sales territories automatically.

q16.q: Can I purchase a perpetual S-Locator license?
q16.a: No – S-Locator is a Software as a Service (SaaS) application. You save on servers, installation, and maintenance costs.

q17.a: S-Locator uses the latest security standards: SSL-encrypted connection, firewalls, encrypted disks, and secure data centers.

q18.a: Yes – S-Locator is fully compliant with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

q19.q: Is the S-Locator route planner available 24/7?
q19.a: Yes, it is designed to be highly available using multiple state-of-the-art servers to ensure zero downtime.

q20.q: Where can I log in? How do I get my login link?
q20.a: Use the login button in the top corner, or get the link from your system administrator.

q21.q: Is S-Locator the right route planning software for me?
q21.a: Yes, if you visit your customers regularly and spend most of your week on the road.

hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions about S-Locator Route Planner
hero.subtitle: Find the answer to your question

cta.title: Many questions are best answered in practice - try S-Locator for free for 30 days.
cta.note: *Full version. No credit card required. Automatic termination.

q1.q: Is S-Locator for centralized or decentralized route planning?
q1.a: S-Locator can be used for centralized, decentralized and combined route planning. Decentralized planning means that the field reps plan their routes themselves using S-Locator. Centralized planning is when back-office staff uses S-Locator to plan routes for the field rep team.

q2.q: Can S-Locator help me avoid traffic jams?
q2.a: Yes, if desired, S-Locator takes the current traffic situation into account when planning the route. For the next trip, priority is then given to those customers who can be reached on roads free of traffic jams.

q3.q: Does S-Locator Route Planner also support me in integrating new customers?
q3.a: Yes – import your new customers into the CRM system of your choice and S-Locator will calculate optimized route plans to visit new customers in addition to your existing customers in a mileage-efficient manner.

q4.q: What are the benefits of territory optimization and route planning from a single source?
q4.a: With S-Locator Territory Optimization + Route Planner, you will experience a level of field sales efficiency you never thought possible. We combine the power of the best route-planning solution on the market with next-generation dynamic territory optimization.

q5.q: Will S-Locator Route Planner record the routes I drive?
q5.a: No; S-Locator Route Planner does not store GPS records of drives. S-Locator is not a surveillance tool. Instead, it is a great help for field reps to visit more customers and drive fewer miles.

q1.q: For which industries is route planning suitable?
q1.a: S-Locator Route Planner is suitable for any size of business: From a one-person company to large corporations with 1,000+ field staff across all varied industries (Pharmaceutical, medical, FMCG, etc).

q2.q: Which use cases is S-Locator suitable for?
q2.a: S-Locator is used for route planning in field sales with regular client calls, one-time visits as part of a product launch, pricing and inventory control in outlets, mystery shopping, new customer acquisition, and recurring service activities.

q1.q: Is there an offline version of S-Locator?
q1.a: S-Locator is an online-web-application with support for offline data storage. In situations without internet connection, your most important data is readily available offline in your browser.

q2.a: S-Locator is designed for high availability: Multiple redundant high performance servers with automatic load balancing, 24/7-Monitoring with automatic alarm, and redundant fiber connectivity.

q3.q: Where is the login? How do I get my access link?
q3.a: If you already have a trial or a paid account, you can use the login button in the top right corner. If you are an employee, you receive your access link from your administrator.

q1.q: I'd like to get a demonstration of S-Locator Route Planner.
q1.a: Would you like to present the sales route planning software S-Locator to your company? We are happy to prepare an online presentation for your management, sales management, and IT management.

q2.q: Is S-Locator the best route planning software for me?
q2.a: S-Locator is the best route planning software for you, if you are visiting your customers on a regular basis and spending most of your week on the road.

q3.q: How do I get help and support for S-Locator?
q3.a: When receiving your account data you also get access to tutorial videos and PDF manuals. Within the application you will find online help. Additionally, our support team is happy to help you via email.

q4.q: Can I try S-Locator without obligation or cost?
q4.a: Yes. Sign up for a free trial of S-Locator Anywhere, a web-version without further requirements. The trial license will automatically expire after 30 days and is limited to one user.

q1.q: Can I buy a perpetual S-Locator license?
q1.a: No – S-Locator is a “software as a service” application. You subscribe to S-Locator as a service and save yourself costs for server hardware, software, installation, maintenance and operation.

q2.q: How much do I save with S-Locator? How soon does it pay off?
q2.a: You currently spend an average of 50€ per customer visit, all expenses considered. With S-Locator, one additional visit per day is possible, meaning 20 additional visits per month. This generates added value equivalent to 1000€ per field rep and per month.

q1.q: Can I integrate the S-Locator route planning algorithm into my own field rep app?
q1.a: Yes, you can! Check out our RESTful JSON S-Locator ISV API.

q2.q: Can I use S-Locator Route Planner with Salesforce, Dynamics CRM or other CRM/ERP systems?
q2.a: Yes, S-Locator Route Planner works with Salesforce, Microsoft Dynamics CRM, Siebel CRM, Sugar CRM and other CRM/ERP systems.

q3.q: Can S-Locator be connected to my CRM?
q3.a: Yes! S-Locator integrates with popular CRM systems like Salesforce or Microsoft Dynamics or imports data via CSV/Excel. This means that customer master data, visit histories and sales targets are always up-to-date.

hero.title: Innovative territory optimization for your field sales team
hero.subtitle: The future of sales force optimization is dynamic planning
hero.desc: Easy to use, powerful in execution, and impressive results. Convince yourself today with the S-Locator territory optimization software.

useCases.title: Use cases for dynamic territory optimization
useCases.faqQ: What is territory optimization in field sales?
useCases.faqA: Territory optimization in field sales refers to the process of reviewing and adjusting existing sales territories based on predefined criteria. The goal is to avoid overloading or underutilizing your field sales team, thereby improving customer satisfaction and significantly reducing driving times.

content.t1: At the push of a button, you can effortlessly distribute the departing employee's customers to the territories of other employees.
content.t2: Employee A wants to work 20 hours instead of 30 per week: Decide as a team and with S-Locator where routes can be reduced and who can take over customers.
content.t3: Mitigate the impact of maternity leave, long holidays, or sick leave by fairly distributing customers among the rest of the team.
content.t4: How do we distribute customers to ensure all A-level customers are visited at least once in Q4? Visualize your planning ideas in a flash.
content.t5: Efficiently integrate your new customers and optimize your territories in seconds when the priorities of your existing customers change.
content.t6: Are you planning to enter a new market and need to expand your sales team? S-Locator automatically determines the right number and locations for new hires.

switcher.mainTitle: This is how easy territory optimization is with S-Locator
switcher.mainDesc: Start from your current situation, and S-Locator guides you step by step to the optimal result in a few moments.

s1.title: Your current situation
s1.desc: Visualize your field reps' customers on the map and display all relevant information in the detailed view.

s2.title: Your optimization settings
s2.desc: In the following steps, you can optionally make manual adjustments or optimization settings for each field rep.

s3.title: Your optimization result
s3.desc: In a few moments, S-Locator calculates the optimization result. Visualize it on the map or in the detailed view.

s4.title: 7 levels of prioritization
s4.desc: With multiple prioritization levels, you can choose between the lowest overall travel time or a balanced workload.

saas.title: Test different scenarios in seconds
saas.p1: Thanks to the power of the S-Locator cloud, you can test different scenarios in seconds - with no installation or updates required. This allows you to easily share optimization suggestions with your team.
saas.p2: In the results, we show how much different territories have degraded or improved. Keep in mind that even seemingly small optimization potentials of 1-2% have a massive impact on your sales success.
saas.p3: With sales force costs of around $10 million per year, a 1% improvement thanks to S-Locator can save you up to $100,000 in sales costs annually.

hero.title: Choose innovative territory optimization!
hero.subtitle: Traditional territory planning is a thing of the past. S-Locator territory optimization is the future.

i1.bad: Manual, slow and/or ZIP code accuracy only
i1.good: Automatic, fast, and precise to street number
i1.desc: Territory planning software needs to know the exact location of customers on the map to ensure accurate planning. Inaccuracies from ZIP code-based tools can easily add 15 minutes of extra travel time per customer. S-Locator converts addresses into geocoordinates automatically at no extra cost.

i2.desc: The actual road network significantly impacts travel times. Using straight-line distances makes results prone to error. S-Locator always uses real routes, taking historical driving speeds into account to deliver highly accurate results.

i3.desc: Visit intervals heavily impact travel time. If you visit a customer weekly instead of monthly, the time spent in the car adds up. S-Locator considers these to group compatible intervals together.

i4.desc: Customers with very restrictive business hours (like doctors' offices) affect travel times. S-Locator handles these constraints efficiently.

i5.desc: Visit duration heavily impacts the number of possible visits per day. S-Locator takes the visit duration of each customer into account.

i6.desc: The shorter the working hours, the greater the negative impact of distant customers. When optimizing your territory, S-Locator considers working hours per day.

i7.desc: In large geographical areas, overnight stays can significantly impact travel time. S-Locator allows you to configure different overnight stay settings for each rep.

i8.desc: Reps make their visits via daily routes. S-Locator takes everything into account by simulating daily routes very precisely.

i9.desc: During visits, there is no guarantee the customer will actually meet the rep. With S-Locator, you can configure the call rate to get realistic results.

i10.desc: The road network changes by up to 15% annually. In S-Locator, we update road maps quarterly automatically and at no extra charge.

i1.desc: Local installation makes you dependent on the IT department. S-Locator requires no installation - all you need is a web browser.

i2.desc: Traditional software is limited to Windows. You can access S-Locator and all its features from any device with a modern web browser.

i3.desc: We use advanced, high-performance servers in S-Locator with computing power up to 50 times that of an average desktop PC.

i4.desc: Data is stored centrally on our cloud servers, so you don't need local storage space or room for maps.

i5.bad: High effort due to local installation
i5.desc: In S-Locator, our cloud servers are updated automatically and transparently several times a year without any intervention from you.

i1.desc: S-Locator is fully dedicated to sales territory optimization, making it intuitive and free from distractions and unnecessary functions.

i2.bad: Overwhelming number of buttons and menus
i2.desc: S-Locator takes the form of an intuitive wizard that displays only the features needed for each step, rather than complex interfaces.

i3.desc: We made S-Locator extremely easy to learn, so anyone responsible for field sales can benefit from it without extensive training.

i4.desc: S-Locator attempts to find the most effective solutions, or provides clear, helpful feedback if a request cannot be met due to conflicting settings.

i5.desc: A few clicks are enough to share results with other users within the app itself for discussion and approval.

i1.desc: Field rep time is expensive. S-Locator optimization is based on route simulation using actual roads to realistically reduce distances.

i2.desc: Overwork causes frustration and underwork wastes resources. S-Locator calculates workloads realistically, offering up to 7 different optimization proposals.

i3.desc: Frequent visits increase sales. Every additional visit you gain through better optimization translates to higher profits.

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions about Dynamic Territory Optimization

items.q1: What are the benefits of territory optimization and route planning from a single source?
items.a1: In many cases, traditional providers offer either one or the other, so you need two different applications. S-Locator combines the power of the best route planning solution with the next generation of dynamic territory optimization.
items.q2: Unlike traditional software, S-Locator supports multiple planners. Where is the advantage in that?
items.a2: With S-Locator, the old idea that only one person can plan is a thing of the past. Our solution allows regional managers to optimize their own territories - a huge advantage when a quick response is needed.
items.q3: Why are common methods like straight-line distances and cluster analysis costly disadvantages?
items.a3: Unrealistic assumptions: Territory optimization using straight lines produces inefficient routes because it ignores real-world factors like traffic conditions and actual roads.
items.q4: Why should a territory optimization solution be dynamic?
items.a4: S-Locator gives you the power of the cloud (SaaS), which provides significant advantages: you can forget about installation, updates, and relying on your IT department.
items.q5: Does territory optimization force me to reallocate my sales territories?
items.a5: In the old, static approach, this was the case. But S-Locator allows you to analyze criteria and choose to reduce visit intervals if you cannot or do not want to reassign a customer to another rep.

hero.p1: In times of skilled labor shortages, S-Locator territory optimization allows you to compensate for staff losses without having to fill vacancies. Sounds too good to be true? Let us show you how.

hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions about S-Locator Territory Optimization
hero.subtitle: Find the answer to your question

general.title: General
general.q1: What are the benefits of territory optimization and route planning from a single source?
general.a1:
In many cases, traditional providers offer either one or the other, so you need two different applications. This has major drawbacks: the sales team is forced to learn two apps, and constantly transferring data between them is frustrating.

With S-Locator, you get field sales efficiency you never imagined because the two systems are seamlessly integrated.
general.q2: Can I use S-Locator for territory planning?
general.a2: Yes, S-Locator supports you in planning and automatically optimizing your sales territories. This not only saves you extra miles but also ensures a balanced workload for your team.
general.q3: Unlike traditional planning, S-Locator accommodates multiple planners. Where is the advantage in that?
general.a3: With S-Locator, the old idea that only one person can plan is a thing of the past. Our solution allows regional managers to optimize their own territories for rapid response.
general.q4: Why are common methods like straight-line distances costly disadvantages?
general.a4: Because they are based on unrealistic assumptions (ignoring traffic and topography) and ignore individual customer needs, resulting in inefficient routes and higher costs.

industries.title: Industries
industries.q1: What use cases is S-Locator suitable for?
industries.a1: It is used for schedule optimization and sales territory alignment. It is suited for field sales teams wanting to organize their territories efficiently and minimize driving times.
industries.q2: Which industries is S-Locator suitable for?
industries.a2: Objectively speaking, territory optimization is essential for any company with an active field sales force, including pharmaceuticals, consumer goods, automotive, and more.

security.title: Security
security.a1: S-Locator uses the most advanced security standards: connection is encrypted, access requires authentication, and data is stored on encrypted disks in protected servers.
security.a2: Yes – S-Locator is fully compliant with GDPR data protection guidelines.

access.title: Access
access.a1: Yes, S-Locator is designed for high availability using multiple high-performance servers with automatic load balancing.
access.q2: Where is the login? How do I get my details?
access.a2: If you have an account or a trial period, you will receive your personal access link via email. The link works on computers, phones, and tablets.

test.title: Trial & Demo
test.q1: How do I get help and support?
test.a1: Our support team is happy to assist you via email. Inside the app, you will find online help and tutorial videos.
test.q2: I would like a demo of S-Locator.
test.a2: We would be happy to set up an online presentation for your management and sales team. Contact us today to schedule an appointment.
test.q3: Is S-Locator the best territory planning software for me?
test.a3: Yes, it is the best if you regularly want to adjust or plan new sales territories while ensuring efficiency, fairness, and reduced sales costs.

purchase.title: Purchasing
purchase.q1: Can I buy a perpetual (lifetime) license?
purchase.a1: No – S-Locator is a 'Software as a Service' (SaaS) application. You subscribe to it as a service, which saves you hardware, installation, and maintenance costs.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.q1: Can I use S-Locator with other CRM/ERP systems?
integrations.a1: Yes, S-Locator integrates seamlessly with popular CRM systems like Salesforce and Microsoft Dynamics, and supports data import via CSV/Excel.

hero.title: Integrations
hero.subtitle: S-Locator within your ecosystem
hero.desc: The S-Locator route planning app offers manual data import and can also be connected to your CRM/ERP system. S-Locator makes it easy to use the data required to plan your route.

manual.title: Manual Import (Excel/CSV)
items: All you need for route optimization is an Excel, CSV, or ODS file containing your customer data.
Use our sample spreadsheet which includes import instructions.
Read our article on data preparation for automatic route planning and learn how to perfectly prepare your data for import.
This tutorial video shows you every step: creating a trial account, importing customers, and calculating the first route.

salesforce.title: S-Locator Connector for Salesforce
items: Import accounts, appointments, and users into S-Locator. Optionally, contacts or leads can also be imported.
Plan optimized routes for your existing customers and appointments in Salesforce.
Automatically export call and visit reports back to Salesforce.
The connector is installed within our cloud server infrastructure and communicates via API.
The Connector app is installed inside Salesforce to support the authentication process.
salesforce.btn: Find out more about the Salesforce connector

dynamics.title: Dynamics CRM Sales
items: Integrate the S-Locator route planning solution into your Microsoft Dynamics CRM versions.
Your companies, contacts, and appointments sync with S-Locator, and changes are transferred back to Dynamics.
Field reps plan their routes and document their visits in the S-Locator app on any device.
S-Locator is integrated as a managed solution with a few clicks by the administrator.
Are you a system integrator for Microsoft Dynamics CRM? Let's talk!
dynamics.btn: Find out more about S-Locator for Dynamics

veeva.title: Veeva CRM
items: The S-Locator connector for Veeva CRM is an out-of-the-box software installed as a managed solution in your organization.
Accounts, best visit times, and saved appointments are considered when calculating the optimized schedule.
Pharma sales reps use the optimized schedule to visit more customers with fewer miles.
You benefit from an AI-powered S-Locator calendar that helps you keep track of your customers.

other.title: Other CRM/ERP Systems
items: No matter what CRM/ERP system you use - if it can export and import Excel or CSV files, you can sync your data with S-Locator.
For regular automated import and export, all you need to do is configure our API PowerShell scripts.
After successful completion of the setup workshop, we will be happy to assist you with integrating the system into your infrastructure.
API connection is included in every company account starting from 2 licenses.

api.title: S-Locator API
items: S-Locator has an HTTPS API for automated data import and export.
Calls are made directly from your system's development environment or programming language.
Find documentation in our API guide and get hands-on training from our API support team.
API access is available in every company account.
api.btn: Find out more about the API

isv.title: ISV API
items: Do you have or are you developing an application for field sales, marketing, or service?
Integrate S-Locator intelligence directly into your app - using our RESTful JSON API.
Offer your customers a new, innovative feature with S-Locator and unlock a new revenue stream.
Expand your field service app to include dynamic route planning and scheduling.

blogPost1.title: Successful sales reporting in the field with S-Locator®

content.p1: In field sales, connecting with customers is not the only factor that determines success. Meaningful sales reporting is just as important, because systematically recording and evaluating your activities, results, and potential allows you to manage sales processes purposefully, optimally utilize resources, and make better decisions.
content.p2: Unfortunately, reporting often fails in practice due to a lack of transparency, time-consuming recording methods, and scattered data sources. In this article, we show you how modern sales reporting works and how S-Locator® supports your field sales team in this process.
content.h2_1: Why sales reporting is so crucial in field sales
content.p3: Professional sales reporting provides insight into the performance of teams, individual employees, and entire regions within your sales territory at the push of a button. A well-managed reporting system answers questions such as:
content.l1_1: Which customers were visited and when?
content.l1_2: What deals and sales were achieved?
content.p4: Without structured sales reporting, this transparency is lost. This often leads to inaccurate forecasts, inefficient use of resources, and missed opportunities. Field staff, on the other hand, need a reporting tool that supports rather than slows them down—one that is fast, mobile, and automated.
content.h2_2: What are typical challenges in sales reporting?
content.p5: Sales reporting is often an unpopular task, especially in the field. The reasons for this include:
content.l2_1_desc: Call reports are manually transferred to the CRM system after appointments. This work takes time and reduces motivation.
content.l2_2_desc: Data is scattered across Excel spreadsheets, notes, or various tools. There is no overall picture or complete solution.
content.l2_3_desc: Decisions are based on outdated figures.
content.l2_4_desc: Data is collected but not translated into meaningful key metrics.
content.h2_3: How does sales reporting with S-Locator® reduce the workload?
content.p6: S-Locator® is much more than just smart route planning. The route planning software provides field teams with integrated sales reporting performed on the mobile device immediately after each customer visit.
content.p7: The most important advantages at a glance:
content.l3_1_desc: Every customer interaction is fully documented immediately after the sales appointment.
content.l3_2_desc: S-Locator® prepares data in a way that enables managers to spot trends instantly.
content.l3_3_desc: S-Locator® integrates seamlessly with Salesforce, Microsoft Dynamics, and other systems.
content.l3_4_desc: Sales management and field staff have updated numbers at their fingertips at all times.
content.h2_4: Practical example: Transparency and efficiency in one step
content.p8: A medium-sized pharmaceutical company uses S-Locator® for automatic route planning for its 30 sales representatives. Previously, visit reports were kept in Excel and only evaluated at the end of the month, meaning a lot of manual work with outdated data. Today, field staff use S-Locator® to log every appointment immediately.
content.p9: Sales reporting in the field doesn't have to be complicated. By focusing on automation, integration, and easy-to-use evaluations, you can save time and gain valuable insights. S-Locator® takes most of the administrative work off your team's shoulders and delivers reports that managers love.
